response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including geospatial projects (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby), but lacks direct experience with modern C++/Rust for routing pipelines. While they demonstrate strong technical versatility and problem-solving skills, the absence of C++/Rust expertise in high-scale geospatial contexts and navigation systems raises concerns about immediate fit.
strengths: Strong geospatial project background (GISCollective) with event-driven architecture and Kubernetes deployment
Experience with low-latency systems and high-performance databases (Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and adapt across full-stack domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with modern C++ or Rust in production environments, which are core requirements
Limited exposure to distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance and service discovery beyond basic microservices
Geospatial experience leans toward web/mobile applications rather than routing data pipelines and tiling systems
